name: color-field
visual_summary: A color field is a form input component for selecting and entering colors, used when a user needs to enter a specific color for design purposes or application themes.
generation_prompt:

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
